text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for my race! I feel so elated!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Let's both get amped up! This race will be ours!
choice_data_list: Get out there and take home first place!
Get out there and take home first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I'll run beautifully, gracefully, and
courageously!
